name: rest-client RubyGem Backdoor (Credential Stealer)
description: Compromised rest-client gem exfiltrates environment variables and enables remote code execution via specially crafted cookies. 114M total downloads. Maintainer account compromised via credential reuse.

affected_packages.name: rest-client
affected_packages.note: Maintainer account compromised via credential reuse from data breach.

remediation: Audit application cookies for RCE payloads
